name: business-central-mcp
description: Direct access to Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central via its native WebSocket protocol.

bc_base_url.title: BC base URL
bc_base_url.description: Business Central server base URL, e.g. http://your-bc-server/BC

bc_username.title: BC username
bc_username.description: NavUserPassword username for the BC server.

bc_password.title: BC password
bc_password.description: NavUserPassword password for the BC server.

bc_profile.title: BC profile
bc_profile.description: Optional profile id, e.g. BUSINESS MANAGER. Affects which Role Center loads and which pages Tell Me indexes.
